title: Registration deadline (demo)
description: If you haven’t registered (or your region requires it), submit before the deadline.

title: Correction window closes (demo)
description: Last chance to fix name/address details in many systems.

title: Polling day (demo)
description: Pack your ID, confirm your polling station, and plan your travel time.

title: Counting day (demo)
description: Counting and results may take time—follow official sources.
